---
title: Contribution to Community Software
page-layout: full
---

I am a main developer of CrySF and contributor to SOSS and LICA.

* **<a href=https://crysf.readthedocs.io/en/latest/> CrySF: MD post processing tool </a>**
* **<a href=https://soss.readthedocs.io/en/latest/> SOSS: Search for optimally stable structures code </a>**  
* **<a href=https://gitlab.bcamath.org/pnath/lica-1.0.0> LICA: Lithion-ion cluster analysis code </a>**
